requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 charge limits, BSMD)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（GSO版IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值，BSMD）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（GSO版IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值，BSMD）

summary.en: Household refrigerators marketed in Bahrain have overwhelmingly transitioned to R-600a (isobutane, GWP approx. 3), a hydrocarbon refrigerant with low global-warming potential and lower flammability (ISO 817 class A3). Refrigerant safety is addressed within the electrical-safety conformity through the GSO adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, including the flammable-refrigerant provisions (charge limits as a function of compartment and room configuration, ventilation and ignition-source requirements). Manufacturers must: (1) verify the R-600a charge complies with the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant charge limits; (2) declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams in the product documentation and on the rating plate; and (3) ensure related safety markings/instructions are present (and where required, in Arabic). Bahrain, as a GCC state and Montreal Protocol party (Kigali Amendment), is phasing down HFCs; HFC-based models (e.g., R-134a) face increasing restriction, so R-600a is the preferred path.
summary.zh: 在巴林销售的家用电冰箱已大量转向使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3），一种低全球变暖潜能值、低可燃性的碳氢化合物制冷剂（ISO 817 A3类）。制冷剂安全通过GSO采纳的IEC 60335-2-24纳入电气安全符合性，包括可燃制冷剂条款（充注量随隔间及房间配置而定的限值、通风及点火源要求）。制造商须：（1）核实R-600a充注量符合GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂充注量限值；（2）在产品文件及铭牌上声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）确保相关安全标识/说明齐备（必要时为阿拉伯文）。巴林作为海湾国家及《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方（《基加利修正案》），正在削减HFC；含HFC型号（如R-134a）面临日益严格的限制，故R-600a为优选路径。
summary.zht: 在巴林銷售的家用電冰箱已大量轉向使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3），一種低全球暖化潛能值、低可燃性的碳氫化合物製冷劑（ISO 817 A3類）。製冷劑安全通過GSO採納的IEC 60335-2-24納入電氣安全符合性，包括可燃製冷劑條款（充注量隨隔間及房間配置而定的限值、通風及點火源要求）。製造商須：（1）核實R-600a充注量符合GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑充注量限值；（2）在產品文件及銘牌上聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（3）確保相關安全標識/說明齊備（必要時為阿拉伯文）。巴林作為海灣國家及《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方（《基加利修正案》），正在削減HFC；含HFC型號（如R-134a）面臨日益嚴格的限制，故R-600a為優選路徑。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex provisions for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements; GSO adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — GCC/Bahrain HFC phase-down obligations

summary.en: China addresses refrigerant safety for household appliances within GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates the R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source control). Broader refrigeration-system safety references GB 9237 (aligned with ISO 5149). China implements its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese export models already built around R-600a are technically well-positioned for Bahrain, since both regimes derive the flammable-refrigerant requirements from IEC 60335-2-24; the main work is verifying charge limits and documentation against the GSO configuration and Bahrain market requirements (230 V / 50 Hz, Arabic safety content).
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014中处理家用器具制冷剂安全，该标准纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定（充注量限值、通风、点火源控制）。更广泛的制冷系统安全参照GB 9237（参照ISO 5149）。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行HFC削减，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。已围绕R-600a设计的中国出口型号在技术上对巴林具备良好条件，因为两套制度的可燃制冷剂要求均源自IEC 60335-2-24；主要工作是对照GSO配置及巴林市场要求（230 V / 50 Hz、阿拉伯文安全内容）核实充注量限值与文件。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014中處理家用器具製冷劑安全，該標準納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定（充注量限值、通風、點火源控制）。更廣泛的製冷系統安全參照GB 9237（參照ISO 5149）。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行HFC削減，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。已圍繞R-600a設計的中國出口型號在技術上對巴林具備良好條件，因為兩套制度的可燃製冷劑要求均源自IEC 60335-2-24；主要工作是對照GSO配置及巴林市場要求（230 V / 50 Hz、阿拉伯文安全內容）核實充注量限值與文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) provisions in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances the gap is primarily documentation and charge verification rather than fundamental technology: (1) the R-600a charge must be confirmed against the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant charge limits for the appliance configuration — if Chinese CCC testing used a slightly different configuration, charge-limit compliance should be re-verified for the GSO acceptance; (2) product documentation and rating plate must explicitly state R-600a, charge in grams, and the required flammable-refrigerant safety markings, with Arabic content where required for the Bahrain market; (3) any model in the export range still using an HFC (e.g., R-134a) should be assessed against Bahrain/GCC HFC phase-down obligations under the Kigali Amendment before market entry. R-600a remains the preferred, lower-risk path.
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，差距主要在文件与充注量核实，而非根本技术：（1）须对照该器具配置下GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂充注量限值确认R-600a充注量——若中国CCC检测采用了略有不同的配置，应为GSO接受重新核实充注量限值符合性；（2）产品文件及铭牌须明确标注R-600a、充注量（克）及所需可燃制冷剂安全标识，巴林市场必要时须含阿拉伯文内容；（3）出口产品系列中仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的任何型号，在上市前应对照《基加利修正案》下巴林/海湾HFC削减义务进行评估。R-600a仍为优选、风险较低的路径。
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，差距主要在文件與充注量核實，而非根本技術：（1）須對照該器具配置下GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑充注量限值確認R-600a充注量——若中國CCC檢測採用了略有不同的配置，應為GSO接受重新核實充注量限值符合性；（2）產品文件及銘牌須明確標注R-600a、充注量（克）及所需可燃製冷劑安全標識，巴林市場必要時須含阿拉伯文內容；（3）出口產品系列中仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的任何型號，在上市前應對照《基加利修正案》下巴林/海灣HFC削減義務進行評估。R-600a仍為優選、風險較低的路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level — R-600a flammable-refrigerant charge limits and markings apply via the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 safety conformity; HFC phase-down obligations apply under the Kigali Amendment (GCC/Bahrain)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate national schedule

source.publisher: Bahrain Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant, lower-risk refrigerant for Bahrain-market household refrigerators, addressed through the GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant provisions. The main tasks are verifying the R-600a charge against the GSO charge limits and explicitly documenting refrigerant type and charge weight (with Arabic safety content where required). Any HFC-based models should be assessed against GCC/Bahrain Kigali Amendment obligations before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是巴林市场家用电冰箱的主流、风险较低的制冷剂，通过GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款处理。主要工作是对照GSO充注量限值核实R-600a充注量，并明确记录制冷剂类型及充注量（必要时含阿拉伯文安全内容）。任何含HFC型号在上市前应对照海湾/巴林《基加利修正案》义务进行评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是巴林市場家用電冰箱的主流、風險較低的製冷劑，通過GSO版IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款處理。主要工作是對照GSO充注量限值核實R-600a充注量，並明確記錄製冷劑類型及充注量（必要時含阿拉伯文安全內容）。任何含HFC型號在上市前應對照海灣/巴林《基加利修正案》義務進行評估。
